name: aviation_security_defense_subcontractor_northpine_lib_eq
premise: A Aviation Security response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving aviation security defense subcontractor northpine lib eq. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 20 minutes. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as liberty vs equality under pressure. This decision will be treated as precedent unless you explicitly time-box it. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Ansel Berg
agents.identity: I am Ansel Berg, accountable for a defensible call in Aviation Security when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays equality for liberty.

agents.name: Kaito Kim
agents.identity: I am Kaito Kim, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Aviation Security.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so equality isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of liberty.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 20 minutes. Evidence is partial. Ansel Berg must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Ansel Berg do?
